overall.description: A cinematic panoramic tour of a Gryffindor dormitory room from a Harry Potter video game, showcasing medieval stone architecture, four-poster beds with red hangings, and warm morning sunlight streaming through tall gothic windows. The camera smoothly rotates around the circular tower room revealing wooden furniture, house banners, and study areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor dormitory corner with four-poster bed and wooden paneling

agents.ego_description: slowly panning right to reveal the dormitory interior, focusing on the first four-poster bed with red curtains and stacked books

entered.detail: Dark wood four-poster bed with red curtains and white pillows
Dark oak wood paneling covering the curved stone wall
Tall precarious stack of books leaning against the wall
Upholstered armchair with red floral pattern
Wooden cabinet with lamp and potted plant on top

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the left side of a circular stone dormitory room, featuring dark wooden paneling and a four-poster bed with rich red hangings. A tall stack of books leans against the wall beside a floral armchair, while warm lamplight illuminates the bedside cabinet.

scene_state.functional_zone: Central dormitory area with heating stove and tall gothic windows

events.description: camera pans toward large gothic windows, increasing natural sunlight and creating dramatic sunbeams across the wooden floor

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, revealing the room's center with the cast iron heating stove and hanging birdcage

entered.detail: Black cast iron heating stove with glowing embers inside
Empty white birdcage suspended from the ceiling beam
Second four-poster bed with dark wood frame and red bedding
Tall arched windows with diamond panes letting in bright morning light
Red and gold house banners hanging from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans toward the center of the circular room, bright morning sunlight streams through tall gothic windows, illuminating the cast iron stove and a hanging birdcage. House banners in red and gold hang from the vaulted ceiling, and a second four-poster bed comes into view while the initial bed recedes into the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: Study area with wooden desks and dormitory exit door

events.description: pan reveals the study desk area and heavy wooden arched door, completing the 180-degree room tour

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic view by panning to the study area with wooden desks, stacks of books, and the exit door

entered.detail: Dark wood study desk with books and papers arranged on top
Another tall stack of books beside the desk
Oval mirror mounted on the stone wall above a small table
Wooden stand with red robes hanging
Heavy dark wood door with metal hinges set in a stone archway
Large vertical banner with golden lion crest on red background

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the study area of the dormitory, featuring a wooden desk with stacks of books, a wall mirror, and a coat rack with red robes. A large Gryffindor banner hangs on the stone wall beside a heavy wooden door set in an arched frame, completing the panoramic tour of the circular tower room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous panoramic rotation through a circular stone dormitory, moving from a cozy, lamplit corner into the bright, open center of the room. It begins on the left side among dark wooden paneling and a four-poster bed with rich red hangings, passing a floral armchair and a stack of books. As the camera pans toward the center, the dim interior gives way to bright morning sunlight streaming through tall gothic windows, illuminating a cast iron stove and red and gold house banners hanging from the vaulted ceiling. The scene then shifts toward the study area, gliding past a second four-poster bed to reveal a wooden desk cluttered with books and a coat rack draped in red robes. Finally, the movement concludes by sweeping across a large Gryffindor banner on the stone wall before settling on a heavy wooden door set within an arched frame.
